_comment: GACI Product/Feature Registry Schema — maps to required Jira Epic fields

product_status.description: Current lifecycle state of the product or feature. Required on epic closure.

gaci_behaviour.Active: Content generation trigger on status change to QA Ready or GA
gaci_behaviour.Beta: Content generation trigger — drafts flagged as Beta in frontmatter
gaci_behaviour.Deprecated: Spawns content lifecycle review task — no new content generated
gaci_behaviour.Sunset: Spawns archive or redirect task depending on successor_feature

content_scope.description: Which content types should be generated for this feature. GACI spawns only the declared agents.
content_scope.gaci_behaviour: Orchestrator reads this field to determine which sub-agents to spawn. None = no content pipeline triggered.

deprecation_reason.description: Free text explanation of why the feature is being deprecated or sunset.

successor_feature.description: Link to the replacement feature epic. If blank when status = Sunset, GACI treats all associated content as archive (no redirect).

gaci_behaviour.populated: Repository content moves to Redirected state — queries return successor content with migration note
gaci_behaviour.blank: Repository content moves to Archived state — suppressed from retrieval, retained for audit

sunset_date.description: Date the feature is fully retired. GACI uses this to schedule archive operations.

trigger_events.manual_override: Slash command from Product Owner or authorised team member
